text:
Once upon a time in the quiet town of Whispering Woods. there lived a curious fox named Felix. He loved exploring around. One autumn morning, Felix climbed up into an old oak tree near Granny Oakley's garden.

Granny Oakley saw him from her bench.

"Oh dear!" she said. "What're you doing up there?"

"Just observing nature." Said Felix.

He noticed a owl.

"The way they hunt."

"Well," said Granny Oakley cautiously. "You look sharper."

One evening, Felix heard singing.

"They must've been robins!"

Later, he sensed something mysterious.

"No birds."

Something fluffy. Huge. White.

He peeked. Snow lions?!

No, just kittens.

"You're dreaming."

That night, Felix dreamt of adventure. Flying. Catching frogs. Somewhere deep forest.

The next day, he found paw prints.

"I could be owl."

No, fox.

He prowled.

Suddenly, shadows.

Whispers.

Something big.

His heart
